title: YouTube star Danny Go mourns heartbreaking loss of 14-year-old son Isaac
summary_full: YouTube sensation Danny Go, known as Daniel Coleman, shared the heartbreaking news of his 14-year-old son Isaac's passing after a battle with cancer. Coleman expressed profound grief, celebrating Isaac's strength and joy despite his health challenges. The family, including wife Mindy, focused on creating cherished memories during Isaac's final months, leaving fans worldwide deeply saddened.
